query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_usuarios,
  SUM(CASE WHEN role = 'cliente' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as clientes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN role = 'equipe_solaris' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as equipe_solaris,
  SUM(CASE WHEN role = 'advogado_senior' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as advogados_senior,
  SUM(CASE WHEN role = 'advogado_junior' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as advogados_junior
FROM users;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 7QDB1rdZo1Phrn3.bcf291fc06f4 --database A6U3GSLMGWuR2P4b85Hiyy --execute 
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_usuarios,
  SUM(CASE WHEN role = 'cliente' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as clientes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN role = 'equipe_solaris' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as equipe_solaris,
  SUM(CASE WHEN role = 'advogado_senior' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as advogados_senior,
  SUM(CASE WHEN role = 'advogado_junior' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as advogados_junior
FROM users;
